variants: Svenja Vogt holds the Chrysalis Mender Qualification, certifying her expertise in occupational therapy. She has been fortunate to have Juan E. Caldera as her mentor, whose support has significantly impacted her career. Svenja is an active member of the Juniper Maskmakers Collective, where she explores the creative side of her professional practice through mask-making. Her innovative projects have been facilitated by funding from the Apex Ember Grant, which endorses the integration of therapeutic practices and art. This combination allows Svenja to make substantial contributions to both her field and the wider community.
